product_overview: This product adds browser-based printing and device integration for the restaurant production platform, supporting thermal label printers, standard document printers, and keyboard-emulating scanners. It ensures labels, operational documents, and reprints are configurable, traceable, and auditable across production and warehouse workflows.
core_goals: Enable browser-based printing for batch, product, container, and warehouse labels using print-ready HTML/CSS layouts.
Support standard document printing for operational sheets such as production summaries and stock documents.
Provide administrative configuration for printers, label templates, and default print preferences.
Record immutable print history and reprint logs for auditability and traceability.
Enforce role-based access control for printer management and reprint actions.
Support keyboard-emulation barcode/QR scanners for fast lookup and navigation.
Require online-only authenticated sessions for all print-related actions.

features.name: User Login
features.description: Users authenticate with email and password before accessing protected printing, dashboard, inventory, production, and admin pages.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/callback/credentials with valid email and password -> Receive 200 and authenticated session/JWT -> Navigate to /dashboard -> Receive dashboard content
POST /api/auth/callback/credentials with invalid credentials -> Receive 401 or authentication error -> Remain on /login with error state

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Authenticated users can view overall system metrics and recent notifications from the main dashboard.
user_flows: GET /api/notifications/recent with a valid auth session -> Receive 200 with recent notification list -> Render /dashboard metrics and notifications
GET /api/notifications/recent without a valid auth session -> Receive 401 or access denied response -> Redirect to /login or show protected-route denial

features.name: Printer Management
features.description: Administrators can create, update, and remove printer configurations, including default printer selection and active status.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/printers with an admin session -> Load printer management UI -> Submit printer configuration changes via server action for savePrinterConfig -> Receive success and updated printer list
Navigate to /admin/printers with a non-admin or unauthorized session -> Receive access denied on protected layout/page -> Printer configuration controls are not available
Submit savePrinterConfig with invalid printer data -> Receive validation error -> Printer record is not created or updated

features.name: Label Template Configuration
features.description: Administrators can manage default print templates, paper sizes, and print preferences used by label generation.
user_flows: Submit updated label template settings via server action for savePrinterConfig or related printing settings -> Receive success -> New print jobs default to the selected template dimensions
Submit template or preference settings with unsupported dimensions or invalid values -> Receive validation error -> Settings are not saved

features.name: Batch and Product Label Printing
features.description: Production and warehouse users can generate print-ready labels for batches and related operational targets using browser print dialogs and QR codes.
user_flows: Open a batch detail page and trigger print label action -> Server action createPrintJob creates a PENDING print job -> Open /printing/label/[id] -> Receive print-ready label layout -> Browser print dialog opens -> Print job is marked completed and audit history is recorded
Submit createPrintJob for a batch in Draft or Deleted state -> Receive rejection or validation error -> No print job is queued
Open /printing/label/[id] for a valid job -> Receive isolated label page with template-specific layout -> Trigger browser print dialog successfully
Request a label print with unsupported or missing payload data -> Receive validation error from createPrintJob -> Job is not created

features.name: Operational Document Printing
features.description: Users can print production summaries, stock summaries, and other operational documents in A4/Letter format with interface chrome hidden.
user_flows: Open a production or stock summary page and click the print summary action -> Dedicated print stylesheet is applied -> Browser print dialog opens with headers, navbars, and action buttons hidden -> Document prints in readable A4 layout
Open a print summary action without a valid protected session -> Receive access denied or redirect to /login -> No document print view is generated
Trigger document print with malformed source data -> Receive server-side or client-side validation error -> Print preview is not rendered

features.name: Print Queue and History Monitoring
features.description: Users can review active print jobs, job statuses, and historical print records for traceability and operational monitoring.
user_flows: Navigate to /printing with a valid authenticated session -> Load print queue/history dashboard -> View job statuses such as PENDING, PROCESSING, COMPLETED, and FAILED
Navigate to /printing without authentication -> Receive protected-route denial -> Dashboard data is not exposed
Request a print history search with no matching records -> Receive empty results set -> Dashboard shows no matching jobs rather than failing

features.name: Reprint Requests and Auditing
features.description: Supervisors and administrators can request reprints for existing jobs with a required reason, while the system records immutable audit entries.
user_flows: Open /printing and select an existing completed print job -> Submit recordReprint with a valid reason -> Receive success -> Print job is reprinted and LABEL_REPRINTED history is recorded
Open /printing as a non-supervisor/non-admin user -> Attempt reprint action -> Receive access denied from RBAC checks -> Reprint dialog or action is blocked
Submit recordReprint without a reason or with an invalid reason value -> Receive validation error -> Reprint is not authorized
Retry a failed print job through updatePrintJobStatus after a printer failure -> Receive updated status and audit log entry -> Failed job is tracked for reconciliation

features.name: Keyboard-Emulation Scanner Input
features.description: Users can scan barcodes or QR codes using keyboard-mode scanners to trigger quick lookup and navigation without special browser permissions.
user_flows: Focus a supported search input on a protected page -> Scanner sends encoded text and Enter -> useKeyboardScanner captures the scan -> Lookup/navigation is triggered to the matching batch or inventory record
Enter text manually at normal typing speed and press Enter -> useKeyboardScanner does not treat input as a scan -> Standard form behavior or manual search result occurs
Provide an invalid or unknown scanned code -> Lookup request returns no matching record -> UI shows not-found or error feedback

features.name: User Login
features.description: Login with email and password credentials

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: View overall metrics and recent notifications
